title: mxbai-rerank: open-weight DeBERTa rerankers review | reranker.uk
description: mxbai-rerank review: mixedbread-ai's open-weight cross-encoder rerankers (xsmall, base, large) built on DeBERTa-v3. Benchmarks, Python usage, hosted API, and the xsmall model that runs in the browser.
og_description: mixedbread-ai's reranker family: Apache 2.0 open weights, a hosted API, and an xsmall variant that runs entirely in the browser.
